questions.text: Which of these is a fossil fuel?
questions.explanation: Coal is a fossil fuel formed from the remains of ancient plants. Wood, biogas, and solar energy are not fossil fuels.

questions.text: Petroleum is also called black gold.
questions.explanation: Petroleum is called black gold because of its great economic importance and dark color.

questions.correctAnswer: The slow process of conversion of dead vegetation into coal.
questions.explanation: Carbonization is the process where dead plants get buried and over millions of years convert into coal under high pressure and temperature.

questions.text: The process of separating petroleum into useful products is called ________.
questions.explanation: Refining is the process of separating crude petroleum into various useful components like petrol, diesel, kerosene, etc.
